stateDiagram

%% Initial state name as "." so that it fits in black circle shape.
%% See https://github.com/StateSmith/StateSmith/issues/404
state "." as ROOT.(InitialState)

Disconnected

Disconnected : Disconnected

Connecting

Connecting : Connecting

Connecting : exit / #123; OnConnectingExit()#59; #125;

state Connected {

        Sending

        Sending : Sending

        ConnectedIdle

        ConnectedIdle : ConnectedIdle

        %% Initial state name as "." so that it fits in black circle shape.
        %% See https://github.com/StateSmith/StateSmith/issues/404
        state "." as Connected.(InitialState)

}

ROOT.(InitialState) --> Disconnected

Disconnected --> Connecting : Connect / #123; TryConnectAsync()#59; #125;

Connecting --> Connected : Connected

Connecting --> Disconnected : ConnectionFailed

Connected --> Disconnected : Disconnect

Sending --> ConnectedIdle : FinishedSending

ConnectedIdle --> Sending : Send

Connected.(InitialState) --> ConnectedIdle
Events
settings
